creator: szymluk86@gmail.com
text:
Hi,
I installed chromium via pkg and after run, from time to time chromium crashes, doesn't respond.

When I run web-browser via vt, vt shows output:
maszynka:~                                                                      % chrome
Utworzono nowe okno w istniejącej sesji przeglądarki.
[2192:448636160:0910/091303:ERROR:nss_util.cc(842)] After loading Root Certs, loaded==false: NSS error code: -8018

Thanks for help :-)
